title: Biome Houses 2: Fresh beginning
description: Continuation of my previous mod, Biome Houses, with fresh new houses for nearly each biome! Made with MCreator!
body:
# Biome Houses
### Inspired by (But not really) ItsMarloe's Biome house series!
![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eb4f66758c6144b8303a76254a7c6b2f151ac9a.png)

## Features

Biome Houses adds a variety of new structures across different biomes! You’ll find custom houses in places like the plains, desert, taiga, and many more each inspired by [ItsMarloe’s Biome House](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8dGhMWGFIUE) series. Every build is designed to fit naturally into its environment while giving each biome a bit more life and personality.

## Upcoming Features

I plan on in future updates that there will be even more biome specific houses, including ones for smaller or often-overlooked biomes, like birch forests and others you might not usually think to build in.
